_note: Machine-readable benchmark expectations for /report-review. Derived from Docs/WIP/2026-04-16_Benchmark_Report_Quality_Status_Matrix.md. Update this file after each significant rerun wave — it is the authoritative source; the WIP doc is the narrative source. Fields null = no verified expectation yet.
_noiseNote: Run-to-run variance on truthPercentage for a given input is typically ≤8%. Differences within this band are noise, not regression.

families.inputValue: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag rechtskräftig bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben
families.qualityStatusNote: Stage 1 contract/anchor failure fixed. Semantic polish on rechtskräftig anchor may still vary across runs.
families._failed_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun 4177998a at HEAD 35a22fba returned UNVERIFIED 50/0 with 0 evidence items, 0 boundaries, 12 LLM calls. Root cause: Stage 2 evidence extraction timed out (467 Fix3 LLM timeouts logged that day; 5 jobs submitted concurrently). NOT treated as a regression — needs isolated single-job rerun to confirm qualityStatus.
knownOpenIssues: semantic precision on rechtskräftig anchor — claim shape still slightly variable
failed isolated-rerun needed: 2026-04-16 concurrent-submission collapse not yet ruled in/out as regression

families.inputValue: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben
families.qualityStatusNote: No fresh direct live rerun on current tree. Inferred from rechtskräftig variant success — same fix set applies.

families.inputValue: Mehr als 235 000 Personen aus dem Asylbereich sind zurzeit in der Schweiz
families.qualityStatusNote: Recovers to sane verdict range on current tree. Strongest desired behavior — consistent retrieval of one clean official SEM aggregate total — is still inconsistent. Can regress to UNVERIFIED 57/40 under refinement path.
families._note_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun e5becebe at HEAD 35a22fba returned MOSTLY-TRUE 78/68. Truth 78 is 3 pts above band max 75 — within 8-pt noise tolerance. Band held; no adjustment needed. Higher confidence (68) is a positive signal.
knownOpenIssues: inconsistent retrieval of direct official SEM aggregate total from primary Swiss source family
can still regress to UNVERIFIED 57/40 with refinement path changes

families.inputValue: 235000 Flüchtlinge leben in der Schweiz, das sind fast so viel im am Ende des Zweiten Weltkrieges.
families.qualityStatusNote: No direct current-stack rerun exists. Historical-comparison dimension adds complexity beyond base asylum-count family. Highest-value next rerun in the matrix.
knownOpenIssues: no current-stack verification at all — historical-comparison dimension unvalidated

families.inputValue: Did the legal proceedings against Jair Bolsonaro comply with Brazilian law, and did the proceedings and the verdicts meet international standards for a fair trial?
families.qualityStatusNote: U.S. government (state.gov) citation contamination fixed on the stronger backstop (ec9840ff). Intermediate fix run still ended MIXED 50.5/54 with visible contamination. Residual uncited state.gov items may remain in evidence pool.
families._note_rerun_2026-04-16: Rerun da3580fe (PT variant, not EN) confirmed LEANING-TRUE 58/61 at HEAD 35a22fba — see bolsonaro-pt entry for EN twin confirmation.
knownOpenIssues: residual uncited state.gov-domain items still in evidence pool (not cited in final report but present in intermediary evidence set)

families.inputValue: O processo judicial contra Jair Bolsonaro por tentativa de golpe de Estado respeitou o direito processual brasileiro e os requisitos constitucionais, e as sentencas proferidas foram justas
families.qualityStatusNote: Direct rerun da3580fe at HEAD 35a22fba confirms LEANING-TRUE 58.2/61. Inferential status converted to confirmed. Language-agnostic fixes transferred correctly from EN variant.

families.inputValue: Using hydrogen for cars is more efficient than using electricity
families.qualityStatusNote: TTW/WTW conflation fixed. Report now correctly exposes distinct full-pathway and tank-to-wheel claims/boundaries. Cleanup territory — no active firefighting needed.

Captain-corrected expectation restores the true-side bar from the Phase 2 archive. The English-language evidence base (global ~9% recycling rate, ~51% of 'recycled' plastic incinerated/landfilled, mechanical recycling not economically profitable per peer-reviewed techno-economic assessments) legitimately supports a true-side verdict. The prior MOSTLY-FALSE/FALSE/MIXED bar reflected a false-side calibration that does not match either the documented historical Phase 2 expectation or the current English-source evidence pool. Latest Sonnet-baseline run 664762ab returned LEANING-TRUE 64/74 — squarely inside the corrected band.
families._note_corrected_expectation_2026-05-26: Corrected from MOSTLY-FALSE/FALSE/MIXED (truth 10-35) to MIXED/LEANING-TRUE/MOSTLY-TRUE (truth 40-75) to align with Phase 2 R3.1 ('40-60% range (MIXED to LEANING-TRUE band). Violation: extreme verdicts <30 or >75') and Phase 2 observed EN-variant mean ~56% across 14 jobs. Same drift pattern as the bolsonaro-en correction in commit d04587ba.
families._phase2_reference: Docs/ARCHIVE/2026-04-11_Phase2_Per_Input_Expectations.md R3.1 — MIXED to LEANING-TRUE band; extreme >75 is a violation. Cross-corroborated by 2026-03-21 LLM Expert handoff (Stage2_Retrieval_Skew_Analysis) and 2026-03-22 Senior Developer Phase1A Experiment Results.
knownOpenIssues: extreme verdicts >75 (MOSTLY-TRUE territory) are still a soft-violation per Phase 2 R3.1 even though direction is correct
evidence aggregation variance across runs can shift truth within the band
cross-language (EN vs DE) gap is documented; this entry is EN-only
